library.name: CANONICAL_EMOJI_CONTROL_LIBRARY
library.purpose: Deduplicated Hyperflow input-layer library with combo-first parser integration and merged beta/gamma extension packs.

principles.atomic_rule: A single emoji represents an atomic signal.
principles.combo_rule: A sequence of emojis represents an execution pipeline or behavior preset.
principles.governance_rule: Emojis do not define system entities. Emojis activate behaviors of entities defined in EDDE, MPS, Observer, and System Schema.
principles.canonical_rule: Canonical meanings are defined here; extensions must be explicitly versioned.
principles.parser_rule: Parsing is combo-first: the parser must resolve the most specific combo before falling back to presets or atomic signals.
